name: The Ungrateful Swindler

sheet.name: The Ungrateful Swindler
sheet.background_story:
This insolent being has dared to take advantage of a generous traveler. 
He betrayed the trust of a generous traveler and had the audacity to think that his actions would have no consequences. 

This cursed one has sealed his fate after being captured by the Crows. 

He awaits his sentence crowsdenofdeath.eth 

"Every wise man fear three things: the storm at sea, the moonless night, and the wrath of a kind man"
